consistency.type_consistency: The type is 'Weapon (dagger)' and the usage implies a dagger.

quality.formatting: Clear and standard for item descriptions.
quality.completeness: Includes bonus, activation condition, effect, save DC, damage, condition application, and usage limitation.

mechanics.base_bonus: +1 to attack and damage rolls (standard for Rare magic weapon).

active_ability.duration: 1 minute or until a hit connects.

hit_effect.failure_condition: Target takes damage and becomes [poisoned] for 1 minute.

mechanics.balance_check: A Rare item granting a constant +1 bonus and a powerful, rechargeable once-per-day poison burst (2d10 + condition) seems appropriate for its rarity.

suggestions: Ensure the [poisoned] condition definition is available elsewhere in the data set or standard rules reference.
